parameters.content:
## How to Setup Google Credentials in n8n

### 1. Create a Google Cloud Console project
- Go to console.cloud.google.com
- New Project → name it (e.g. n8n-course)

### 2. Enable the APIs you need
- APIs & Services → Library
- Enable: Google Sheets API, Google Drive API, Gmail API, Google Docs API

### 3. Configure OAuth Consent Screen
- User type: External
- Fill app name, support email, developer email
- Scopes: leave default for now
- Test users: ADD YOUR EMAIL (critical!)

### 4. Create OAuth Client Credentials
- Credentials → Create → OAuth Client ID
- Application type: Web Application
- **Authorized redirect URI:** copy the EXACT URL from n8n credential screen
  (one wrong character = invalid_request error)

### 5. Publish App (Audience)
- Audience tab → Publish App
- Otherwise refresh tokens expire after 7 days

### 6. Finish n8n credential
- Paste Client ID + Client Secret
- Click Sign in with Google
- Approve scopes

### Common Gotchas
- Redirect URI must match EXACTLY (https, trailing slash, path)
- App stuck in Testing → only test users can sign in
- Wrong scopes → 403 on certain operations
- Trailing whitespace when pasting Client ID/Secret

### Test Your Credential

Once your Google credential is set up, click Execute to test it.

This will append a test row to a Google Sheet you control.

If it works → your credential is good. ✅
If it errors → check the gotchas on the left.
